'''vanara''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:chaetetid|chaetetid]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-n-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:chaetetid|chaetetid]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| vanara
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:vænæræth|vænæræth]] || [[word:vænæræj|vænæræj]] || [[word:vænæræsh|vænæræsh]] || [[word:vænæræ|vænæræ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:vananarath|vananarath]] || [[word:vananaraj|vananaraj]] || [[word:vananarash|vananarash]] || [[word:vananara|vananara]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:vanarath|vanarath]] || [[word:vanaraj|vanaraj]] || [[word:vanarash|vanarash]] || [[word:vanara|vanara]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:vanafrath|vanafrath]] || [[word:vanafraj|vanafraj]] || [[word:vanafrash|vanafrash]] || [[word:vanafraf|vanafraf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:vanaratha|vanaratha]] || [[word:vanaraja|vanaraja]] || [[word:vanarasha|vanarasha]] || [[word:vanaraka|vanaraka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:vanarath|vanarath]] || [[word:vanaraj|vanaraj]] || [[word:vanarash|vanarash]] || [[word:vanara|vanara]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:vanarathal|vanarathal]] || [[word:vanarajal|vanarajal]] || [[word:vanarashal|vanarashal]] || [[word:vanarakal|vanarakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:vanarathatha|vanarathatha]] || [[word:vanarajaja|vanarajaja]] || [[word:vanarashasha|vanarashasha]] || [[word:vanaraka|vanaraka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:vanarathan|vanarathan]] || [[word:vanarajan|vanarajan]] || [[word:vanarashan|vanarashan]] || [[word:vanarakan|vanarakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:vanarathaoro|vanarathaoro]] || [[word:vanarajaoro|vanarajaoro]] || [[word:vanarashaoro|vanarashaoro]] || [[word:vanarakaoro|vanarakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|bfc4f79}}
